arts.ttl: Liverpool look to repeat Mane trick with big money transfer for PERFECT Salah successor
arts.sum: Mbeumo has been a standout performer for Brentford in the Premier League this season, which has caught the eye of Liverpool’s scouts after watching the Cameroonian in action at numerous times this year. Only Salah, Alexander Isak and Erling Haaland have scored more goals than Mbeumo in the Premier League this season, with the right-sided forward having his most productive campaign yet.

arts.ttl: Leicester supporters display furious aeroplane banner over the King Power ahead of clash with Liverpool - and blast the Championship-bound club's owners with brutal six-word message
arts.sum: A number of supporters are disillusioned with those at the top of the club, who oversaw relegation to the Championship in 2023. The same fate is almost guaranteed to befall them this season.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane savages Ruud van Nistelrooy's Leicester City and claims Foxes already 'look like a Championship team' - as they near an immediate return to second tier
arts.sum: Roy Keane has savaged Leicester City , managed by his former Manchester United teammate Ruud van Nistelrooy, for their failure to improve under the Dutchman.

arts.ttl: Lazio Star Ranks Highly on Liverpool Summer Wishlist
arts.sum: Lazio midfielder Nicolo Rovella has emerged as a potential transfer target for runaway Premier League leaders Arsenal heading into the summer. Gazzetta dello Sport recently detailed how Lazio's financial situation could force the club to sell their prized asset. The post Lazio Star Ranks Highly on Liverpool Summer Wishlist appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Leicester v Liverpool team news: Gakpo starts, Alexander-Arnold a sub
arts.sum: Arne Slot makes two changes for the Reds The post Leicester v Liverpool team news: Gakpo starts, Alexander-Arnold a sub appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool join race to sign attacking prodigy from Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in signing the highly rated Leicester City attacker Jeremy Monga at the end of the season. According to a report from Fichajes, Liverpool are keeping tabs on the 15-year-old attacker, and they could look to make a move for him in the summer. Liverpool have done well to nurture talented young players […] The post Report: Liverpool join race to sign attacking prodigy from Premier League rivals appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool star and Champions League winner left 'almost dying' in hospital after urgent issue
arts.sum: Fernando Morientes has spoken for the first time since he was left hospitalised through a pulmonary embolism - something which is life-threatening if not urgently treated

arts.ttl: Roy Keane risks wrath of ex-Man Utd team-mate Ruud van Nistelrooy with brutal verdict
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy needs a miracle to stop Leicester from going down to the Championship amid his nightmare spell in charge of the Foxes, who'll be relegated if they fail to beat Liverpool

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher raises Liverpool transfer theory after Arne Slot meeting - 'big job to be done'
arts.sum: Liverpool remain top of the Premier League but this summer is being dubbed as a big one for the Reds

arts.ttl: Leicester v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from this 4.30pm BST kick-off Premier League table | Top scorers | Email Will Ian Copestake emails: “All this talk of one-sidedness makes it feel like Liverpool are playing Wimbledon again in a certain fina of yore.. It also shows that people follow narratives rather than watch games as playing bottom feeders is exactly the sort of opponent Liverpool struggle against. You’ve been warned.” I’ve watched enough Leicester this season … Continue reading...
